app.subtitle: Simple script generator for AutoHotkey v1
settings.title: Settings
settings.resetDescription: Delete the configuration file and restart the application.
settings.resetConfirmation: Reset all settings and restart the application?
placeholder.selectedHotkey: Click keys below to build a hotkey...
action.send.label: Text to send
action.send.hint: This text will be typed when the hotkey is pressed.
action.run.label: Path to app / file
action.run.hint: Full path to the program or file that should be opened.
action.url.label: URL address
action.url.hint: Web address that will open in the default browser.
action.command.label: Command to run
action.command.hint: Raw system command that will be executed (Run).
sendMode.event.title: Switches this hotkey to the older Event method instead of the faster Input method - try this only if Input mode causes issues in a specific app.
sendMode.event: Use Event send mode instead of Input
hint.hotstring.trigger: The abbreviation you'll type to trigger the replacement.
hint.hotstring.replacement: The text that will replace the trigger once it's typed.
hotstring.auto.title: Replaces the trigger as soon as it's typed, without needing to press Enter, Space, or Tab afterwards.
hotstring.case.title: The trigger must match the exact capitalization you typed (e.g. "Btw" won't match "btw").
hotstring.inside.title: Allows the trigger to fire even when it's part of a longer word, not just on its own.
hotstring.raw.title: Sends the replacement text literally, without interpreting things like {Enter} as key presses.
remap.pickKey: Click here, then pick a key
list.hotkeys.title: Added hotkeys
list.hotstrings.title: Added hotstrings
list.remaps.title: Added remaps
empty.hotkeys: No hotkeys added yet. Use the keyboard above.
empty.hotstrings: No hotstrings added yet. Fill out the form above.
empty.remaps: No remaps added yet. Use the keyboard above.
preview.title: Script preview (.ahk)
error.missingSignature: This file wasn't created by AHK Generator (missing the "Made with AHKgen" signature), so it can't be parsed reliably. Only files generated by this app can be re-opened.
error.noHotkeyKey: Please select a key on the keyboard above.
error.emptyAction: The action field cannot be empty.
error.duplicateHotkey: Hotkey "{prefix}" is already on the list.
error.remapMissingFrom: Please pick a "From" key on the keyboard above.
error.remapMissingTo: Please pick a "To" key on the keyboard above.
status.noRecognizableEntries: No recognizable hotkeys, hotstrings, or remaps were found in this file.
status.browseError: Error while browsing for a file: {error}
